vitals.terrain: Mixed: coastal roads, forest roads, rolling hills, mountain passes
vitals.location: Viana do Castelo, Alto Minho, Portugal

course_description.overview: The Viana Granfondo is a non-competitive sportive cycling event featuring three distance options through Northern Portugal's Lima and Minho river valleys, with the Serra d'Arga mountain range as backdrop. All routes start and finish at Praia Norte beach in Viana do Castelo, passing through picturesque villages including Ponte de Lima, Paredes de Coura, and Caminha, with a scenic Atlantic coastal return.

key_segments.name: Minifondo (60 km)
key_segments.description: Mostly flat route with gentle climbs at Costa and Vila Verde. First half on forest roads toward Caminha, then coastal return along Atlantic shoreline.

key_segments.name: Mediofondo (80 km)
key_segments.description: Balanced intermediate route. Passes through Amonde, Meixedo, and Lanheses around Serra d'Arga. Includes Cabração climb (3 km at 6.6% gradient). Finishes at Praia Norte beach.

key_segments.name: Granfondo (130 km)
key_segments.description: Most demanding route for experienced cyclists. Extends to Paredes de Coura with challenging terrain through Agualonga, Rubiães, Sapardos, and Covas. Features Sopos climb (4.5 km at 6.2% gradient). Intense pace through Vilar de Mouros and Venade before coastal finish.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: The event offers progressive difficulty across three distances. The Minifondo is beginner-friendly with minimal elevation challenges. The Mediofondo provides intermediate challenge with sustained climbs and varied terrain. The Granfondo demands experienced cyclists capable of handling longer distances and significant elevation gain, particularly the Sopos and Cabração climbs.

logistics.getting_there: Located in Viana do Castelo, Northern Portugal. Accessible via major routes through the Alto Minho region.
logistics.accommodation: Not specified in search results. Viana do Castelo is a coastal city with typical tourist infrastructure.
logistics.registration_details: Registration via official Bikeservice website. Open to riders aged 15 and above (distance dependent on age category). Registration closes shortly before event date.
logistics.bike_logistics: Not specified. Standard road bike or gravel bike suitable for paved roads.
logistics.local_considerations: Event includes cycling expo, children's activities, and post-ride gathering with food and music. Medical assistance and clear signage provided throughout routes. Coastal finish at Praia Norte beach.

final_verdict.one_liner: A well-organized, scenic Portuguese granfondo offering three accessible distance options through stunning river valleys and coastal landscapes.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Cyclists of all levels seeking a non-competitive sportive experience. Beginners can enjoy the 60 km Minifondo, intermediates the 80 km Mediofondo, and experienced riders the challenging 130 km Granfondo. Ideal for those valuing scenic beauty and community atmosphere over competitive racing.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, particularly for European cyclists seeking a quality-organized event in a picturesque region. The combination of three distance options, excellent organization, aid stations, and coastal finish makes it accessible and rewarding across skill levels.
pro_tips: Register early via Bikeservice website as registration closes shortly before the event
Choose your distance based on experience level; the Minifondo is genuinely beginner-friendly despite being listed as 60 km
Arrive early to enjoy the cycling expo and plan your route strategy
The coastal return section provides mental relief; pace yourself on the climbs (Cabração and Sopos) to enjoy the final scenic stretch

youtube_data.search_query: Viana Granfondo gran fondo cycling Viana do Castelo

videos.title: Granfondo VIANA DO CASTELO | Aventura de Ciclismo no coração da cidade
videos.description:
VIANA GRANFONDO 🇵🇹

1700 ciclistas num Granfondo que teve uma pitada muito especial, largamos entre os 100 primeiros e pudemos sentir a emoção de andar no meio de um pelotão cheio de feras!

Um desafio à altura das belas paisagens que se encontram pelo caminho, cada obstáculo ultrapassado era premiado com uma vista de tirar o fôlego!

Três percursos de diferentes graus de dificuldade mas todos eles capazes de deixar belíssimas recordações. 

São eles: o Granfondo, com 131 km; o Mediofondo, com 84 km; e o Minifondo, com 62 km.

Os percursos, com partida e chegada à cidade de Viana do Castelo, passando por concelhos como Ponte de Lima, Paredes de Coura ou Caminha, oferecem paisagens únicas de mar e serra, assim como um riquíssimo património cultural de onde há a destacar, entre outros, o Templo do Sagrado Coração de Jesus, no monte de Santa Luzia, ou o Santuário de Nossa Senhora das Neves, em Caminha.

“Vamos conquistar o coração do Minho”

Um grande abraço para todos.
